{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175258AB0F4501085B545D8B6E"}"},"total":24243},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7597133107331171096","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"7.大家可以往后看看 坑太浅了。很多角色还没有出场嘞哈哈哈哈哈。包没雌竞的（后面追更 要真有了我先🤬）漂亮官女友解决的包利索的！
8.有一点要吐槽 就是女主手缝有点大😂 兑换物资这方面 自己人可以适当中和点 对外还是不要投太多了。[思考]
【这是返评：第8点作者老师有改进，谁懂！良性建议被作者看到 还付诸行动的爽感！】
（就纯恶人嘛 而且男女都有恶人 大家不要急着说女角色少 阿巴阿巴我觉得是坑太浅了）（作者不是刚开嘛） @张泡泡 大大你说嘞
（我看有人说我恰钱了 别搞😂那让我胖二十斤[快哭了] 看我主页书评各有各的差评吧）
9.追到现在 没塌 没墨迹 没大雷 故事线也都铺开了。（感觉近期老师状态不太好 团体战那一段节奏有点乱没上去。但总体不失望 后面也有调整。）
10.新剧情让我快要碎了… ┭┮﹏┭┮","text_exts":[{"e":219,"s":214,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6+CXrU/R1WcE5VIX5vSS/M="}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770604884,"group_id":"7448581895861849112","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1618081343606195"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7448581895861849112","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1818"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读68小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":243053,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":17},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7473942988597068568","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"咱很少打五星的[爱心]这本包能追的 人设目前没砸 不过后面塌了会追评吐槽。——评价在下面。
1.剧情发展利索不墨迹！小高潮发挥稳定 
2.有仇包追的 心态不稳也能及时定位 爽了～[吃瓜]
3.女主性格转变很ok 开始的是僵硬交流 公事公办风 而后即使被温暖后 也依旧保持着自己的 底线和风格人设稳定发展！
（好多独狼转团体 人设直接就崩了 比如直接保姆式送法 这个必须得夸夸[OK][舔屏]）
4.目前为止 没有毒点 角色无论好坏 优秀与否都分配均衡 不好词汇是有 但是女主她直接拉黑或者定位嘎掉耶～ 回击简单高效 队友也不拖沓 阅读感＋1＋1＋1哈哈哈哈哈！[爱慕]
5.在剔除永久队友中 主打不墨迹 解决迅速。
6.这点是追连载的重要原因：在求生之路上 从独狼到团体的发展 是让我感受到了温馨的。[飞吻]
这本书里角色氛围很好（主角团能留下的都有闪光点 主要大家都自觉等价物资交换[思考] 白嫖怪等也被女主利索剔除）
包括书评里读者的氛围也同样很好。（有的求生文评论区里 到处都是恶臭发言[尬笑]）（所以读者观感好感＋1＋1哈哈哈）
最后[爱心]还会追评！希望大大中后期依旧稳定！不想最后修差评（超过三星的 女频求生无cp真真真太少了）
大大多更点 看不够╥﹏╥[快哭了]
我不白看我给你刷小催更符 还摇人！[顶帖][我也强推]
——题外话
大大码字辛苦啦！[爱心] @张泡泡","text_exts":[{"e":590,"s":586,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6+CXrU/R1WcE5VIX5vSS/M="}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740172191,"group_id":"7448581895861849112","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"如果受到伤害 正义却迟迟不见 那就用双手拿起斧头
我已走在路上 纵死无悔","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7dK0vL3hKz7gIgGdkv6ONDgIdChu8VB1bsqVogIIXTk","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c9f1c19f15824b029062f1494b4c5dd3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536605&x-signature=HTnEheX%2FgYqvlVEuBmX8r%2BLdplw%3D","user_id":"1618081343606195","user_name":"有零食吃么"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1618081343606195","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7448581895861849112","book_info":{"abstract":"女强、无Cp、无感情戏、清醒人设、群像、团队
戚许独自在这条充满危机与死亡的公路上闯荡了将近4年时间，天灾不断、怪物强悍、逐渐从一个柔弱到不能杀鸡的弱女子变成了杀伐果断的资深玩家，却还是遗憾死在了副本里...
临死前却触发了珍贵道具翡翠之心，回到了参加公路游戏的第1天！
戚许短暂迷茫过后，凭借对于这个游戏的各种先知，逐渐混成了常年霸榜的存在。
这一次，有伙伴，有队友，有值得信赖和依靠的团队，那..我就要走到这条公路尽头！
避雷，不是纯女文，小队有男。
团队核心成员：
女：戚许、退役魔法少男、看老娘削你、扁桃体永不发言、财神爷独生女、破茧成蝶、欧皇附体、木子李、圆珠笔、芝士奶盖八分糖
男：中华小当家、战狼009、战狼蛋蛋七、浪里老白龙、元气少女锅得缸、金钟罩铁布衫、宋培风、非酋附体。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a5c4e4f82de7f6f26b6e7558c73cb9f7","author":"张泡泡","author_id":"","book_id":"7448581895861849112","book_name":"车越粉人越狠这榜一我当定了","book_short_name":"去公路尽头","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"36.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7448586057462858264","read_count":"367241","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1982480"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"976","tags":"游戏体育,重生,无CP,大佬,天灾,基建,宠物","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/34342adca81b759d089f02048529136a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184378&x-signature=nPIDHqJ1Nt%2B4JM3xsxZV8LGXJSs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111174162161","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175258AB0F4501085B545D8B6E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":218,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13638,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":53591},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1740198290,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7471290013340861209","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大大写的很好看呜呜呜太精彩了！女主理智强大。
我最心动的就是大大关于粉色垃圾车的构造，其他末日求生文为了凸显女主的强大总会把女主和黑灰这些深沉色系紧紧联系在一起，但这本书一反常态，女主的垃圾车粉粉的，电锯粉粉的，但她依旧强大，并不只有黑色才是强大，粉色也是充满力量的颜色。
就像团队中的每个人（虽然现在只模糊有个雏形），充满着不一样的的色彩，让无聊且逐渐残酷的求生慢慢开始充满生机。
我也始终认为，人性光辉的一面是需要一些美丽的美好的东西来激发的，每日充满杀戮最后也只会变成怪物。
总的来说，作者文笔诙谐，情节逗趣精彩，很值得一看，入股不亏！
最后，希望大大按自己的节奏写下去，毕竟你才是作者，你笔下的人物归属于你，你有权决定赋予他们怎样的人生和性格，加油！","text_exts":[{"e":49,"s":45,"text":"末日求生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%AB%E6%97%A5%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774000378545D8B6E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227471290013340861209%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227448581895861849112%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%AB%E6%97%A5%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739548621,"group_id":"7448581895861849112","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"男女看纯爱，男男看抹布的殷商天才（主打一个包容度超高）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NykhutXrYm54DZFEzqHvseo=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/12eaff93dfb64f1296b3de12b739bf9d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530335&x-signature=RCISEyZi%2BbIOtyt%2BcoP5P5Rm8pw%3D","user_id":"343521114993176","user_name":"藤椒鸡尖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"343521114993176","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7448581895861849112","book_info":{"abstract":"女强、无Cp、无感情戏、清醒人设、群像、团队
戚许独自在这条充满危机与死亡的公路上闯荡了将近4年时间，天灾不断、怪物强悍、逐渐从一个柔弱到不能杀鸡的弱女子变成了杀伐果断的资深玩家，却还是遗憾死在了副本里...
临死前却触发了珍贵道具翡翠之心，回到了参加公路游戏的第1天！
戚许短暂迷茫过后，凭借对于这个游戏的各种先知，逐渐混成了常年霸榜的存在。
这一次，有伙伴，有队友，有值得信赖和依靠的团队，那..我就要走到这条公路尽头！
避雷，不是纯女文，小队有男。
团队核心成员：
女：戚许、退役魔法少男、看老娘削你、扁桃体永不发言、财神爷独生女、破茧成蝶、欧皇附体、木子李、圆珠笔、芝士奶盖八分糖
男：中华小当家、战狼009、战狼蛋蛋七、浪里老白龙、元气少女锅得缸、金钟罩铁布衫、宋培风、非酋附体。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a5c4e4f82de7f6f26b6e7558c73cb9f7","author":"张泡泡","author_id":"","book_id":"7448581895861849112","book_name":"车越粉人越狠这榜一我当定了","book_short_name":"去公路尽头","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"36.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7448586057462858264","read_count":"367241","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1982480"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"976","tags":"游戏体育,重生,无CP,大佬,天灾,基建,宠物","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/34342adca81b759d089f02048529136a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184378&x-signature=nPIDHqJ1Nt%2B4JM3xsxZV8LGXJSs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111174162161","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"97"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175258AB0F4501085B545D8B6E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":102,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":917,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16615,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":55826},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7467194560096305945","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"又双叒找到了一本精品女频求生文！
是我很少看的团队文，虽然是团队，但是女主没有无条件帮扶，也不像一些圣母文带着一堆累赘，这文队友帮女主做事，作用很大，总之写得没有倒贴感，同样公屏也没有女主亏本还自以为奸商的睿智情节，更重要的是这文主角性格杀伐果断，该杀就杀不啰嗦，是求生文中最受欢迎的那类利索狠人，非常加分！
就是文很短，怕后面坑了……话说我发现一个事，女频求生里公路求生文的质量好像普遍高一些，就是能好好完结的少，希望作者不要掉链子，保质保量完结，五星奉上！","text_exts":[{"e":123,"s":119,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774000378545D8B6E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227467194560096305945%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227448581895861849112%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":186,"s":182,"text":"公路求生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%AC%E8%B7%AF%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774000378545D8B6E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227467194560096305945%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227448581895861849112%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%AC%E8%B7%AF%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738594332,"group_id":"7448581895861849112","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0/qWbtjUtVGVQPYKQKDHBU=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7fa0107ed00c4e8a95c6da56eb869634~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528119&x-signature=lHUOWz8Myp%2F3HFIT0eMoFTuiqrY%3D","user_id":"100186529117","user_name":"从今天开始做苏丹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100186529117","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7448581895861849112","book_info":{"abstract":"女强、无Cp、无感情戏、清醒人设、群像、团队
戚许独自在这条充满危机与死亡的公路上闯荡了将近4年时间，天灾不断、怪物强悍、逐渐从一个柔弱到不能杀鸡的弱女子变成了杀伐果断的资深玩家，却还是遗憾死在了副本里...
临死前却触发了珍贵道具翡翠之心，回到了参加公路游戏的第1天！
戚许短暂迷茫过后，凭借对于这个游戏的各种先知，逐渐混成了常年霸榜的存在。
这一次，有伙伴，有队友，有值得信赖和依靠的团队，那..我就要走到这条公路尽头！
避雷，不是纯女文，小队有男。
团队核心成员：
女：戚许、退役魔法少男、看老娘削你、扁桃体永不发言、财神爷独生女、破茧成蝶、欧皇附体、木子李、圆珠笔、芝士奶盖八分糖
